mapper.sql: select id, user_id, device_id, diastolic, systolic, create_time from qkyd_blood
mapper.insert:
insert into qkyd_blood
user_id, device_id, diastolic, systolic, create_time,
#{userId}, #{deviceId}, #{diastolic}, #{systolic}, #{createTime},
mapper.delete:
delete from qkyd_blood where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN sex = '0' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS man, SUM(CASE WHEN sex = '1' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS woman, SUM(CASE WHEN sex = '2' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS nono, SUM(CASE WHEN age BETWEEN 6 AND 14 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS a, SUM(CASE WHEN age BETWEEN 15 AND 19 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS b, SUM(CASE WHEN age BETWEEN 20 AND 39 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS c, SUM(CASE WHEN age BETWEEN 40 AND 59 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS d, SUM(CASE WHEN age >= 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS e FROM sys_user;
